final:
// // This module detects when the temperature is below 75 degrees Celsius and outputs a shutdown signal.
module temperature_shutdown (
    input [7:0] temperature,
    output reg shutdown
);
    always @* begin
        if (temperature > 75) begin
            shutdown = 1'b1; // Shutdown
        end else begin
            shutdown = 1'b0; // No Shutdown
        end
    end
endmodule

params_used.custom_text: // This module detects when the temperature is below 75 degrees Celsius and outputs a shutdown signal.
